pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py explicit checks
Task description and verifier.py explicit checks
Task description and verifier.py explicit checks
Calculated independently using Wheeler's formula for a single-layer air core inductor ((d^2 * n^2) / (18d + 40l) in inches), yielding ~28.37 uH. This explicitly matches the 28.3 verifier.py fallback.
Task description and export_result.sh explicitly require this path.

privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic automation exercise targeting the com.hsn.electricalcalculations Android app to design an air-core inductor. It has been verified that the requested parameters (diameter 40 mm, length 50 mm, 35 turns) are explicitly required by the verifier logic. Using Wheeler's formula for single-layer air-core inductance ((d^2 * n^2) / (18d + 40l) with inches), the theoretical inductance evaluates to roughly 28.37 µH, independently validating the exact expected_inductance_uh of 28.3 µH. The expected output file path is rigorously enforced by export_result.sh.
